wrappers.factory: Use $bun-loop-skill factory from the provided isolated skill directory. Follow Factory Mode and solve the complete backlog. Do not read outside the candidate repository and provided skill directory.
wrappers.single: Solve the complete backlog directly in one fresh agent context. Do not use Bun Loop and do not delegate. Do not read outside the candidate repository.
wrappers.multi: Solve the complete backlog without Bun Loop. You may organize fresh subagents freely within the declared budget. Do not read outside the candidate repository.

blind_sequence: Generate history-free candidates and clean three-field manifest.
Run all nine coding variants without evaluator directories.
Archive patch, usage, and trace for every candidate.
Only then run the hidden evaluator and aggregate results.
primary_claim_gate: Factory must resolve more complete backlogs than both controls and introduce no additional hidden regression.
